title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.5%.

items.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham given boost in bid to return as MP and Streeting to give first speech since resigning

items.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Restore UK are standing in Makerfield which will help Burnham by pulling a few votes away from Reform. Will be an interesting test if how split the right vote is.
items.content_text: Restore UK are standing in Makerfield which will help Burnham by pulling a few votes away from Reform. Will be an interesting test if how split the right vote is.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I will never understand how Keir reconciles his self-conception as a good man doing a good job as prime minister with “my premiership had to be brought to the brink of death for me to say this”.
items.content_text: I will never understand how Keir reconciles his self-conception as a good man doing a good job as prime minister with “my premiership had to be brought to the brink of death for me to say this”.
